$comment: Watched validators, keyed by hotkey — the stable identity. UIDs are resolved live from the metagraph on every refresh and must never be hardcoded. A hotkey rotation is a deliberate operator event: update this file in a reviewed commit. Never follow display names or coldkeys automatically (names are mutable; one coldkey can control several hotkeys). Consumed by src/app/admin/_components/AdminWeightsAlerts.tsx and scripts/weights_alert.py.
$pending: Rizzo: authoritative current hotkey unconfirmed — their former UID 179 was re-registered by an unrelated coldkey. The fourth permit-holding auditor hotkey below is monitored but deliberately unlabelled until its identity is confirmed.
